Tyler Mitchell


Hi! I am a GIS Specialist at ECI and a Geography PhD candidate in the Carolina Tree-Ring Science Laboratory at UNC Greensboro. I am broadly interested in data analytics, ecology, and spatial statistics.


I am located in Greensboro, NC in the piedmont ecoregion where I like to read, run, play guitar, and be with friends!

various writing
